hero.name: Alessio Brunello
hero.tagline: I build scalable frontend systems and lead delivery teams, integrating Claude Code, MCP, and agentic workflows into everyday engineering.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Frontend Tech Lead with over 10 years of experience building modern, performant, and scalable web and mobile applications. I focus on designing intuitive digital solutions, leading development teams, and contributing to architectural decisions to ensure high-quality products.
about.description2: I work daily with React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. I treat AI as an engineering multiplier: I integrate Claude Code, Model Context Protocol, and agentic workflows into delivery, prototyping, and code review.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with daily

points: Leading a frontend team of 2-3 developers, coordinating web and mobile projects with focus on quality, performance, and delivery
Technical lead for the cloud-based management platform in the specialized retail sector, at Bludata — a leading Italian company with over 5000 clients
Led the technology migration from legacy web platform (600+ active users) to a modern, scalable cloud architecture
Designing and developing enterprise frontend architecture with React, TypeScript, and modern best practices
Building cross-platform mobile applications with React Native and Flutter for iOS and Android
Implementing interactive real-time data dashboards and GDPR-compliant PWAs
Integrating AI-assisted development into team workflow, experimenting with Claude Code, MCP, and agent/subagent workflows to accelerate development and code review
Internal training sessions on artificial intelligence and AI-augmented development
Contributing to architectural decisions, systematic code reviews, and mentorship for team growth
Cross-functional collaboration with product, backend, and design teams in Agile environments
